turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Meri antidepressant medication khatam ho rahi hai. Kya phone pe refill ho sakta hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, kuch medications ke liye phone request possible hai, lekin psychiatry medications ke liye doctor ka short telephonic consultation hona better hai. Kya main Dr. Meera Goswami ke saath callback arrange kar sakta hoon?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, please. Mera naam Tanvir Sheikh hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Note kar liya Tanvir ji. Aapka registered number pe Dr. Goswami aaj ya kal callback karenge refill ke liye. Koi emergency nahi na abhi?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nahi, 3-4 din ki dawai bachi hai. Theek hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Callback arrange ho jayegi. Aur agar koi problem ho toh turant call karna. Khayal rakhein apna.
